evals.prompt: Grill this plan against the existing domain model before I implement it.
evals.expected_output: A one-question-at-a-time interview that checks glossary, ADRs, code evidence, and updates domain docs as decisions crystallize.
assertions: Searches for CONTEXT.md, CONTEXT-MAP.md, and ADRs.
Asks one question at a time with a recommended answer.
Updates context documentation only when a term is resolved.
